::: {.callout-warning title="Actualizar el sistema"}
```{.sh code-line-numbers="false"}
sudo apt update
sudo apt upgrade -y
```
:::


---------

#### 1️⃣ Habilitar los repositorios e instalar [`ros-apt-source`](https://github.com/ros-infrastructure/ros-apt-source/)

- Habilitar el [respositorio *Universe* de Ubuntu](https://help.ubuntu.com/community/Repositories/Ubuntu)
```{.sh code-line-numbers="false"}
sudo apt install software-properties-common curl -y
```
```{.sh code-line-numbers="false"}
sudo add-apt-repository universe
```

- Instalar `ros-apt-source`
```{.sh code-line-numbers="false"}
export ROS_APT_SOURCE_VERSION=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/ros-infrastructure/ros-apt-source/releases/latest | grep -F "tag_name" | awk -F'"' '{print $4}')
```
```{.sh code-line-numbers="false"}
curl -L -o /tmp/ros2-apt-source.deb "https://github.com/ros-infrastructure/ros-apt-source/releases/download/${ROS_APT_SOURCE_VERSION}/ros2-apt-source_${ROS_APT_SOURCE_VERSION}.$(. /etc/os-release && echo ${UBUNTU_CODENAME:-${VERSION_CODENAME}})_all.deb"
```
```{.sh code-line-numbers="false"}
sudo dpkg -i /tmp/ros2-apt-source.deb
```

---------

#### 2️⃣ Instalar las herramientas de desarrollo

- Actualizar repositorios apt y asegurar que los paquetes se encuentren actualizados
```{.sh code-line-numbers="false"}
sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y
```
- Instalar las herramientas de desarrollo
```{.sh code-line-numbers="false"}
sudo apt install ros-dev-tools
```

---------

#### 3️⃣ Instalar ROS 2
- Instalación *Desktop*: ROS, RViz, demos, etc.
```{.bash code-line-numbers="false"}
sudo apt install ros-jazzy-desktop -y
```

---------

::: {.callout}
##### Traducido de [docs.ros.org](https://docs.ros.org/en/jazzy/Installation/Ubuntu-Install-Debs.html){target="_blank"}
:::
